name: chinahospitalsguide
description: China Hospitals Guide - Static site built with Eleventy

scripts.build: npm run optimize-images && eleventy && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js && node scripts/inject-hints.js && node scripts/fix-webp.js && node scripts/inject-enhancements.js && node scripts/inject-robots-meta.js && node scripts/fix-duplicate-schema.js && node scripts/inject-schema.js && node scripts/inject-crosslinks.js && node scripts/paginate-blog.js && cleancss -o _site/styles.css _site/styles.css && node scripts/minify-html.js
